birthdayLetter:
Hello baby, first of all I wanna greet you a happy, happy 6th monthsary. Alam kong since last week of January, it’s been really hard for the both of us. This relationship has been through a lot of ups and downs, we’ve been through multiple heartbreaks, pero despite all that, we still find our way back to each other, and that means a lot to me.

I know naman siguro napapansin mo kung gaano ako nagbabago lately. The reason why I’m changing is because I don’t want you to feel overwhelmed sa akin. I’m trying to limit myself kasi sabi mo nga, you want peace sa love, so maybe being like this is better for you. I’m trying my best na hindi na maging super kulit or too much, pero honestly, minsan hindi ko rin alam kung tama pa ba ginagawa ko. But still, I’m trying for you.

I want you to know na I love you very much, and hindi nagbago ‘yon. Kahit anong mangyari, hindi nagbago or bumabaw yung love ko sayo. We’re just in that phase where we’re working on things together, diba? Figuring things out kung paano ba talaga dapat, and I’m willing to go through all that with you.

Sana kung may mga gusto kang baguhin ko, sabihin mo sa’kin. Be more honest with me, kasi I’m really willing to be better for you. Sana hindi ka magsawa, and sana maging okay na yung pakiramdam mo, kasi yun naman talaga yung pinaka importante sa akin, yung maging okay ka.

Pasensya ka na kung medyo late ‘to, and kung maliit lang tong gift ko. Babawi ako next time, I promise. Medyo limited lang din kasi time ko lately, and whenever I do have time, gusto ko lang talaga i-spend yun with you.

Basta, I just want to say, I hope you still love me. And you said diba na you’re gonna work on yourself din? So let’s do this together ha. Let’s grow together.

You’re my everything, and I want you to be my end game, the last chapter, the last page of my story. Just like this, I’ll continue loving you until I fully understand you, until makalaya ka sa kahit anong naglilimit sayo to fully trust me.

Mahal kita, at patuloy kitang mamahalin.
I love you endlessly, Zy.

Happy monthsary, baby.
